title: Cisco India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cisco India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!
